name: Random Web Flag Smoke Test
story: A minimal web service displays the session-specific Altair flag as soon as the learner opens the lab.
objectives: Verify that web labs receive ALTAIR_FLAG_STEP_1 and that the learner can submit the generated session flag immediately.

steps.title: Read the random session flag
steps.description: Open the web lab and copy the flag displayed on the page.
steps.question: What is the random session flag displayed by the web lab?

hints.text: The flag is displayed directly on the first page.
The app reads ALTAIR_FLAG_STEP_1 from the container environment.
